[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 10/31 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Aris (Maid)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 10/31 (Tue) After Maintenance – 11/14 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
